items.name: Talking Head Clean
items.description: Tighten a direct-to-camera video while keeping it natural and confident.
items.zoom_rule: Subtle punch-ins only on emphasis beats.
items.shorts_behavior: Disabled by default unless the user asks for candidates.
items.cta_preservation: Preserve intro hook and final CTA if present.
items.planner_hint: Prioritize clarity, hooks, and a premium talking-head rhythm.
